title: Tick Changer
description: A mod that adds the `/tick` command, just like in the newer versions.
body:
**A mod that adds the `/tick` command, just like in the newer versions.**

**!!!THIS MOD IS NOT AN EXACT COPY OF THE ORIGINAL, THEREFORE, THE LOGIC DIFFERS SLIGHTLY. IT IS SIMPLY AN ATTEMPT TO RECREATE THAT LOGIC SPECIFICALLY FOR VERSION 1.20.1!!!**
